normalized_output.edit_description: Add a comment field at the top of the JSON file to specify the retention period (90 days) and creation date for all evidence pack files.
normalized_output.explanation: All evidence pack JSON files should start with a comment or metadata field stating the retention period (90 days) and creation date. The new content adds the required metadata structure to the template.
normalized_output.validation_command: python -c "import json; f=open('docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json'); data=json.load(f); assert data.get('metadata') and 'retention_period_days' in data['metadata'] and 'creation_date' in data['metadata']; f.close()"
